notes: DOC-015 (Docs Integrity / route-total reconciliation, Issue #019 / R-023) closure. The substantive reconciliation was completed in a prior session but its uncommitted changes were stranded in the working tree on main after PR #590 merged. This session rescued them onto a proper branch (chore/doc-015-closure), leaving the concurrently-held IFC-214/IFC-215 files untouched. Directly verified this session: content-audit (211 routes, 0 drift), route-total-consistency test (15/15), prettier --check (clean, 9 files). TypeScript/lint/build are validated by the non-bypassable scripts/pre-ship.mjs pre-push gate; the landed commit only exists on origin if that gate passed green. The Sprint_plan.csv Status flip to Completed is deliberately deferred to a separate follow-up PR (chore(csv): DOC-015 status flip via flip-task-status.mjs).
